name: Apple Brunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
Please note:  This recipe calls for a Duncan Hines Butter Golden Cake Mix.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan. Combine dry cake mix, eggs, butter, and water in a large mixing bowl. Mix cake according to package directions. Pour about 2/3 of the batter into the pan. Toss apples with sugar and cinnamon. Spoon over batter in pan. Spread remaining batter over apples. Bake at 375°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a rack for 25 minutes. Remove from pan; cool completely on a rack. Sprinkle cooled cake with confectioners' sugar.
